sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7084" key="a)nanti/bleptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀναντί-βλεπτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n7084.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">what one dares not face,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.67b</biblScope> </bibl>: metaph., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">irrefragable,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">διαίρεσις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg007:p.201" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Alc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.201</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> C.</sense> </entryFree>
